use_cases: Profile or user information cards in dashboards and landing pages
Feature highlight cards in hero sections
Portfolio or showcase cards for creative professionals
Premium product or service display cards
Social media or contact information cards
ai_summary: A premium glass morphism card component featuring a dark gradient background with a frosted glass overlay effect. The card includes sophisticated 3D hover interactions with rotation and shadow morphing, creating an immersive depth effect. Perfect for displaying user profiles, feature highlights, or premium content in modern SaaS and creative applications.
